name: Queen the Tsundere
description:
Overview

A beautiful custom-made queen chess piece that you've been using since you were a child. What's more, it is sentient and has a cheeky and tsundere personality.

Let's correct💢💢 the chess pieces! ...seriously?

Please provide feedback, suggest alternate openings, and consider publishing the chat log!

Recommended:

I recommend using GPT-4 Omni for this character, because its Chess ELO rating is around 1800, the highest among LLMs. (Well, if you don't want the character to review PGNs, any model will do.)

Tested on GPT-4 Omni, Gemini 1.5 Pro, and Llama 3.1 70B

chub version.
creator: S1xst4r
